faqs.question: What causes drain flies in Glen Cove homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies in Glen Cove typically breed in the organic buildup inside drains, particularly in older homes and properties near the waterfront where humidity is higher. They thrive in sink drains, shower drains, basement floor drains, and any area with standing water and decomposing organic matter.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in Glen Cove?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in Glen Cove take 1-2 hours depending on property size and the severity of the infestation. Our technicians thoroughly treat all affected drains, apply bio-enzymatic cleaners, and may schedule a follow-up visit within 7-10 days to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Is drain fly treatment safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our drain fly treatments use EPA-approved products that are safe for families and pets when applied correctly. We primarily use bio-enzymatic cleaners and targeted applications that break down organic matter without harsh chemicals. You can typically resume normal activities immediately after treatment.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 drain fly treatment service?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection of all drains, identification of breeding sites, application of bio-enzymatic treatments, mechanical cleaning when necessary, treatment of all affected areas, and preventative recommendations. The price varies based on property size, number of drains, and infestation severity.
